title: Promote Geo-Node Helper Functions to node_helpers.py
description: Move small helper functions currently defined inline in tool_quilt.py into node_helpers.py where they can be shared across all geo-node modules. Functions to promote: boolean_and(group, a, b) — FunctionNodeBooleanMath AND wrapper; boolean_not(group, a) — FunctionNodeBooleanMath NOT wrapper; field_at_index(group, domain, value, index) — GeometryNodeFieldAtIndex wrapper; _evaluate_closure(group, closure_socket, input_socket) — NodeEvaluateClosure wiring; _build_closure_with_curve(nodes, links, label, points) — creates a closure zone with custom float curve points. These are general-purpose geometry node building blocks used by quilting and needed by masonry, worn edges, and future node groups.
definition-of-done: 1. boolean_and, boolean_not, field_at_index are in node_helpers.py. 2. evaluate_closure and build_closure_with_curve are in closures.py (or node_helpers.py, depending on whether they need closure-specific imports). 3. tool_quilt.py imports from the shared location. 4. All existing node groups still validate.
testing-plan: 1. Move functions. 2. Update imports in tool_quilt.py. 3. validate --group Quilting passes. 4. Verify no other modules break.
todos: Move boolean_and, boolean_not, field_at_index to node_helpers.py
